title: Purane Qile Ka Khazana
subtitle: Mughal dor ki chhupi hui daulat...
mystery: Ek historian ne Agra Fort ke paas khudai mein Mughal dor ka ek sone ka sikka dhunda tha. Agli subah sikka uske tent se gayab tha. Sirf uske do assistant the wahan.

clues.name: Laal Mitti
clues.description: Tent ke andar laal mitti ke paon ke nishaan, jo sirf khudai wali jagah milti hai.

clues.name: Train Ticket
clues.description: Delhi ki train ka tatkal ticket, usi din ka.

characters.name: Rahul
characters.description: Kaafi dino se loan chukane ke pressure mein tha.

dialogues.response: Main apne tent mein so raha tha.

dialogues.trigger: Delhi kyu jaa rahe ho achanak?
dialogues.response: Woh toh... ghar mein emergency hai! Sikka maine nahi liya!

characters.name: Dr. Verma
characters.description: Apni research ko lekar bahut protective hain.

dialogues.trigger: Kise pata tha sikke ke baare mein?
dialogues.response: Sirf mujhe aur Rahul ko. Uske jooton pe wahi laal mitti lagi thi subah.

spots.name: Main Tent ⛺
spots.description: Dr. Verma ka tent, jahan sikka rakha tha.

title: Swarn Mandir Ka Langar
subtitle: Sewa mein kisne ki chori?
mystery: Langar ke liye rakha gaya 50 kilo ghee ek raat mein chori ho gaya. Bazar mein itna ghee chupana aasan nahi.

clues.name: Tyre Ke Nishan
clues.description: Gudam ke bahar truck ke naye tyre ke nishan.

characters.name: Banta Halwai
characters.description: Mithaai ki dukaan hai. Raat ko iska mini-truck idhar hi tha.

dialogues.response: Main toh aata-jaata rehta hoon samaan ke liye.
Oye, ye bill toh puraana hai... Ghee maine sewadar se kharida!
Banta ka truck maine dekha tha, usne bola aata delivery karne aaya hai.

title: Wagah Ki Sarhad
subtitle: Border ke paas chalaki ka khel...
mystery: Ek local jasoos ke ghar se ek sensitive map chori ho gaya. Gaon mein sirf do mehmaan the.

clues.name: Toota Flash
clues.description: Camera ka toota hua flash map wali mez ke paas.

clues.name: Videshi Joota
clues.description: Khet mein imported joote ka nishan.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Dikhne mein sidha sadha, par raat ko khet mein jaata hai.

dialogues.trigger: Mez ke paas kya kar rahe the?
dialogues.response: Just taking pictures of the moon!
It fell... Map maine print karne ke liye photo liya tha!

characters.name: Major Singh
characters.description: Gusse mein hain apna map khone ke baad.

dialogues.response: Sirf ye photographer Alex tha mere room ke aas-paas. Uske imported joote pehchan me aate hain.

title: T Nagar Ka Sona
subtitle: Chennai ke sabse bheed wale bazaar mein...
mystery: Ek jewellery showroom se ek designer set trial room se gayab. Customer ne andar se door lock kiya tha par set uske purse mein nahi mila.

clues.name: Khula AC Vent
clues.description: Trial room ka AC vent andar se khula tha.

clues.name: Staff Locker Key
clues.description: Vent ke paas staff room ki chabhi giri thi.

characters.name: Kannan
characters.description: Vent safai ka kaam yehi dekhta hai.

dialogues.response: Madam thi na, unhone hi liya hoga!

dialogues.trigger: Tumhari chabhi vent ke paas kaise?
dialogues.response: Woh gir gayi hogi! Maine AC vent se haath daal ke set nahi nikala!

characters.name: Anjali
characters.description: Bahut pareshan hai ki uspe shak ho raha hai.

dialogues.response: Main change kar rahi thi, tabhi upar se kuch aawaz aayi thi!

title: Hussain Sagar Ki Gawah
subtitle: Lake ke paas ek sunsaan raat...
mystery: Ek politician ka briefcase jisme secret documents the, Necklace Road se chori ho gaya. Unka driver behosh paya gaya.

clues.name: Neend Ki Dawai
clues.description: Driver ki bottle mein neend ki dawai ka powder.

clues.name: Naya Cash
clues.description: Driver ke dashboard me naye notes ka bundle.

characters.name: Raju Driver
characters.description: Behosh hone ka naatak kar raha tha.

dialogues.response: Kisi ne piche se kapda sunghaya sir.

dialogues.trigger: Bottle mein dawai tumne khud daali?
dialogues.response: Nahi! Aur woh cash mera loan ka paisa hai! Maine sir ko dhokha nahi diya!

characters.name: Minister Rao
characters.description: Gusse mein hain, opposition par shak hai.

dialogues.response: Main ice cream lene gaya, laut ke aaya toh Raju behosh aur brief case gayab. Uska naya cash bundle maine dekha dashboard mein!
